response:
If you're looking for **acoustic songs from Korea**, here are some beautiful and popular tracks across different genres (K-pop, ballads, indie, and folk) that are often performed acoustically or have a stripped-down, intimate feel:

---

### **1. K-Pop Acoustic Versions**
Many K-pop songs have **acoustic versions** released by artists or covered by others. Here are some standout examples:
- **BTS – "Spring Day" (Acoustic Ver.)**
  - A fan-favorite ballad with a gentle guitar arrangement.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xobw9_mqrbI)
- **EXO – "The First Snow" (Acoustic Ver.)**
  - A winter-themed ballad with soft piano and vocals.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **IU – "Through the Night" (밤편지)**
  - A classic Korean ballad with a simple guitar/piano arrangement.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4HG_CJzyX6A)
- **DAY6 – "You Were Beautiful" (예뻤어)**
  - A rock band’s acoustic track with emotional vocals.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hqU5lPLd3Vk)
- **SEVENTEEN – "Don’t Wanna Cry" (Acoustic Ver.)**
  - A heartfelt ballad with a stripped-down arrangement.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)

---

### **2. Korean Ballads & Folk (Acoustic Style)**
These songs are **naturally acoustic** or have a folk/indie feel:
- **Kim Kwang-seok – "With Her" (그녀와의 이별)**
  - A legendary Korean folk song with raw guitar and vocals.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Yoon Jong-shin – "Like It" (좋아)**
  - A sweet, simple acoustic love song.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **10cm – "Sleepless in ____" (잠이 오질 않네요)**
  - A soft, indie-folk track with a cozy vibe.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Jung Seung-hwan – "If It Is You" (너였다면)**
  - A beautiful ballad from the *Moon Lovers* OST.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Heize – "And July" (And July)**
  - A dreamy, acoustic-style R&B track.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)

---

### **3. Indie/Folk Korean Artists (Acoustic Focus)**
If you love **Korean indie/folk**, check out these artists:
- **Kim Sa-wol** (김사월) – *"Wind Song"* (바람의 노래)
  - A poetic, acoustic folk song.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Hwang So-yoon** (황소윤) – *"The Moon"* (달)
  - A gentle, acoustic track with soft vocals.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Jannabi** – *"For Lovers Who Hesitate"* (주저하는 연인들을 위해)
  - A folk-pop song with a warm, acoustic feel.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Busker Busker** – *"Cherry Blossom Ending"* (벚꽃 엔딩)
  - A nostalgic, acoustic-style hit.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)

---

### **4. Korean OSTs (Acoustic Versions)**
Many **K-drama OSTs** have acoustic versions:
- **Gummy – "You Are My Everything" (도깨비 OST)**
  - A powerful ballad with a stripped-down version.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Ailee – "I Will Go to You Like the First Snow" (도깨비 OST)**
  - A breathtaking acoustic version exists.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)
- **Chen (EXO) – "The Best Luck" (괜찮아, 사랑이야 OST)**
  - A soft, acoustic-style ballad.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)

---

### **5. Korean Acoustic Covers (YouTube)**
Many Korean YouTubers cover songs **acoustically**:
- **J.Fla** – Covers of K-pop songs in acoustic style.
  - [YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/c/JFlaMusic)
- **Acoustic Korea** – A channel dedicated to acoustic covers.
  - [YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/c/AcousticKorea)
- **Kwon Jin-ah** – A singer known for acoustic performances.
  - [YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JvzYlQ5XJ5A)

---

### **Where to Find More?**
- **Spotify Playlists**:
  - ["Korean Acoustic Love Songs"](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/37i9dQZF1DX4SBhb3fqCJd)
  - ["K-Indie Acoustic"](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/37i9dQZF1DX5trt9i14X7j)
- **YouTube Search**:
  - Try keywords like:
    - *"Korean acoustic song"*
    - *"K-pop acoustic version"*
    - *"Korean folk music"*

---

### **Recommendation Based on Mood**
| **Mood**          | **Song Recommendation**                     |
|-------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| **Romantic**      | IU – "Through the Night"                   |
| **Sad/Nostalgic** | Kim Kwang-seok – "With Her"                |
| **Chill/Relaxing**| 10cm – "Sleepless in ____"                 |
| **Upbeat Acoustic** | Busker Busker – "Cherry Blossom Ending"  |
| **OST Vibes**     | Gummy – "You Are My Everything"            |

Would you like recommendations for a **specific mood, artist, or era**? Let me know! 😊
